text: Amazon Athena @ ancaia @ s ¢ Queries where loading/transformation isn't desired ® Occasional / Ad-hoc queries on data in S3 e Serverless querying scenarios - cost conscious * Querying AWS logs - VPC Flow logs, CloudTrail, ELB logs, cost reports etc... * AWS Glue Data Catalog & Web Server Logs e w/ Athena Federated Query .. other data sources
